# BP-109 negative variant: a non-Gin context with the same method names is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-109-variant-safe.go
variant: non-gin
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type Context struct{}

func (Context) json(int, any) {}

func update(ctx Context) {
	ctx.json(http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{"error": "failed"})
	ctx.json(http.StatusOK, map[string]bool{"updated": true})
}
